intro: Things I've built while learning — from Python utilities to web experiments. Each card opens to a longer write-up.

items.title: Universe Toolkit (PyQt)
items.description: A small Python desktop app built as my final project for the Shark Coders Python course. It pulls sky data and renders helpful views for planning astrophotography sessions.
items.body: Built while learning Python — pulls ephemeris data for common deep-sky targets and renders a few helpful views (rise/transit/set times, target altitude through the night, simple sky-map). It's rough around the edges, but it taught me a lot about Qt, threading, and the kind of patience astrophotography demands.
